title: Overdue payment escalation
description: Payment outstanding for 60 days. Escalation required per billing policy SLA.

title: Audit finding: missing KYC docs
description: Audit revealed incomplete KYC documentation. Compliance team flagged for immediate remediation.

title: AML threshold breach
description: Transaction volume exceeded AML reporting threshold. Suspicious Activity Report filed.

title: Reconciliation: bank statement
description: Bank statement reconciliation failed. 3 transactions unmatched in payments ledger.
